no: Foundling by Lava Del Vortel. Colours of Infinity NPC companion mod.
sum: Shadow Adept NPC and quest mod featuring a thrall of a Shadow Dragon, introducing Shadow Weave Magic, new areas, characters, and items.

co.n: Yes, but don't patch the existing save games
co.no: New game required. Recommended for fresh EET installs

in.t: Uses ACTION_READLN for class choice (1=Shadow Adept, 2=SA/Thief). Requires manual input.
